title: Vintage Shopping in Paris & Florence, Shopping My Sister’s Closet and Birthday Trip to Italy

questions.question: What does the speaker say about the eyewear presentation she needs to attend?
options: A) She has already attended it
B) She is excited because they have many brands she loves
D) She plans to skip it
questions.explanation: 根据字幕，speaker说 'I have to go to an eyewear presentation of the King group, which I'm so excited cuz they have so many brands I love.' 说明她很期待这个眼镜展示活动，因为她喜欢的品牌很多。

questions.question: What type of denim is mentioned in the video?
questions.explanation: 字幕中明确提到 'with the balloon type of denim'，指的是宽松的、类似气球形状的牛仔裤款式。

questions.question: Why is the speaker waiting for someone according to the video?
options: B) Waiting for her sister Lisa to help her
questions.explanation: 字幕显示 'I mean I am waiting on my sister Lisa' 和 'I'm waiting on her cuz she was supposed to come and help me'，说明她在等姐姐Lisa来帮助她。

questions.question: What does the speaker say about what to wear tonight?
options: A) She knows exactly what to wear
B) She doesn't know what to wear because the place is super fancy
C) She doesn't care about the outfit
D) She will wear casual clothes
questions.explanation: 字幕中她说 'I was like I don't know what to wear tonight cuz the place we're going super fancy'，说明她不知道穿什么因为要去的地方非常正式。

questions.question: What is the speaker going to do according to the video?
options: A) Get hair and makeup done
questions.explanation: 字幕显示 'Simple simple. and ready to get to hair and makeup'，说明她准备好去做头发和化妆了。

questions.question: What is described as 'only half day, which is great'?
questions.explanation: 在购物相关的内容中，字幕提到 'It's only half day, which is great'，结合上下文可能是指购物时间或某个活动的一半时间。

questions.question: What kind of look is described for a birthday celebration?
questions.explanation: 字幕中明确提到 'The Dolceita vibe, but we love the look for a birthday'，说明这是一种适合生日的Dolceita风格。

questions.question: What does the speaker say she was supposed to do?
questions.explanation: 字幕显示 'I said I was supposed to go with you and just be, you know, an assistant'，说明她本应该作为助理一起去。

questions.question: What happened when the speaker saw something?
options: B) She decided they needed to buy it
C) She showed it to her friend
questions.explanation: 字幕中说 'So when I saw it, I was like, we need to buy it'，说明她看到后觉得需要买下来。

questions.question: What Italian word does the speaker say she loves to say for 'mouse'?
questions.explanation: 字幕中明确提到 'I actually love the word topolino to say mouse in Italian'，topolino是意大利语中小老鼠的意思。

questions.question: What price is mentioned for the Chanel pants?
questions.explanation: 字幕中提到 'the Chanel pants I showed you, the jeans, it was €500'，香奈儿牛仔裤价格是500欧元。

questions.question: What are they watching according to the video?
questions.explanation: 字幕显示 'We were watching the qualies the F1 qualies uh Monaco from yesterday'，他们在看F1排位赛。

questions.question: When do they leave according to the video?
questions.explanation: 字幕中说 'We have the full day ahead of us since we leave only tomorrow morning'，他们明天早上才离开。

questions.question: What dilemma are they having at 3 p.m.?
options: B) Watching the Hollang Yahoo finals vs something else
questions.explanation: 字幕提到 'we're having a huge dilemma because at 3 p.m. you have the Hollang Yahoo finals'，他们在纠结3点要看的比赛。

questions.question: Where did they go to chill according to the video?
questions.explanation: 字幕中说 'So, we went back to the hotel to chill a little bit cuz it was really warm'，因为天气很热，他们回酒店休息。

questions.question: What is the speaker's feeling described in the video?
options: A) I am on a fashion high
questions.explanation: 字幕中明确说 'I am on a fashion high'，说明她正处于时尚的兴奋状态。

questions.question: Describe what the speaker is planning for the evening based on what you heard. What outfit challenge is she facing?
questions.explanation: 这是一道口语题，需要根据视频内容描述speaker的晚间计划和她面临的服装挑战。
questions.referenceAnswer: She mentions she doesn't know what to wear tonight because the place they're going is super fancy. She needs to choose an appropriate outfit for a fancy occasion.
questions.hint: Think about what she says about the event and the place they are going

questions.question: What happened at Kmart according to the video? Describe what the speaker and her companion were doing.
questions.explanation: 这是一道口语题，需要描述在Kmart发生的事情。
questions.referenceAnswer: They had lunch together and went to Kmart. They were standing in the queue (waiting in line).
questions.hint: Think about the sequence of activities mentioned

questions.question: The speaker mentions a 'little sister moment' at the end of the day. Based on the context, what do you think this refers to?
questions.explanation: 这是一道理解题，需要根据上下文推断'little sister moment'的含义。
questions.referenceAnswer: This likely refers to a bonding moment with her sister, possibly shopping together, helping each other, or having a special sister-to-sister conversation.
questions.hint: Think about what activities involve her sister throughout the video

questions.question: What food and drink are mentioned for a celebration?
questions.explanation: 字幕中提到 'We'll have champagne and you can have some cheese. I love this little plate.'，这是庆祝活动中的香槟和奶酪。

questions.question: What item is described as a clutch?
questions.explanation: 字幕中说 'I love it because it's a clutch'，clutch是一种手拿包/手包。

questions.question: What colors are mentioned for the bag?
questions.explanation: 字幕中提到 'White t-shirts and like and a black and silver bag'，包是黑色和银色的。

questions.question: What does the speaker say about the prices in the video?
options: B) There was all types of prices
questions.explanation: 字幕中明确说 'There was all types of prices'，说明价格有高有低，种类多样。

questions.question: What does the speaker think about one of the items she saw?
options: B) She didn't like it that much
questions.explanation: 字幕中说 'I didn't like that much'，说明她不是特别喜欢那样东西。
